quoted_content: - **Check capacity before a local Fable run.** `oracle doctor lanes --json` reports the fable-local `single_flight_lock` busy state (only one local Fable run is allowed at a time). It is a read-only peek — it never acquires or clears the lock. If the lane is busy, wait or pass `--wait-for-lock <duration>` instead of racing a second `claude` spawn.
